message:
style(tests/util/timeout): cargo fmt line-wrap adjustments

Two rustfmt-width fixes in the `tests/util/timeout` module:

- The `spawn_with_timeout_or_diag(cmd, "intentional_hang", None,
  Duration::from_millis(300))` call site collapses from its
  four-argument multi-line form back to one line; rustfmt width
  preferences kept oscillating between the two shapes in
  successive diffs.
- An inner `entries.iter().any(|e| e.starts_with("sub/b.bin"))`
  call is rewrapped onto three lines so the iterator chain no
  longer exceeds the 100-column limit.

No test logic changed — `git diff --ignore-all-space` on this
file is empty. Committed separately so the upcoming ibuuh.19
lockstep tests land with a clean blame line and a format-only
rustfmt blip does not show up as part of the lockstep commit.
